reasoning: GEOMETRY CHECK: (a) Column 0 vs Column 31 — at 8x zoom the leftmost and rightmost pixel columns show different element distributions; a prominent orange fragment near top-left has no mirror element at the top-right column edge, indicating column 0 ≠ column 31. (c) 3x3 mental tile — both vertical and horizontal seam lines would be visible as discontinuous bands of color, since edge elements on opposite sides are unbalanced. SEAM FAIL. (8) Seam artifact — confirmed fail as noted above. Summary: pixel art style and color discipline are solid, but the tile fails the primary tileability requirement. The random scatter was not edge-wrapped, producing inevitable seam lines on repetition.
